}

	name = Lucas # Canon, a lord, first Lothston lord of Harrenhal
	dynasty = dynn_Lothston
	dna = Lothston_5

	martial = 6
	stewardship = 7
	diplomacy = 7
	prowess = 10

	religion = fots_seven
	culture = riverman_main

	father = Lothston_4
	mother = Bigglestone_31

	trait = education_martial_3
	trait = education_martial_prowess_3
	trait = patient
	trait = brave
	trait = ambitious # see below
	trait = arbitrary # pimped out his own wife and daughter for profit
	trait = charming

	disallow_random_traits = yes

	8113.1.1 = {
		birth = yes
		make_trait_inactive = scripted_appearance
		add_character_flag = canon_status_canon
	}
	8129.1.1 = { trait = knight }
	8136.3.19 = {
		employer = Targaryen_78 # Aegon III Targaryen
		effect = { # Master-at-arms at Red Keep
			agot_appoint_as_councillor_for_castle_history_effect = {
				CASTLE = title:c_kings_landing
				POSITION = councillor_marshal
			}
		}
	}
	8151.1.1 = { add_spouse = Stokeworth_23 } # Falena Stokeworth, canon date
	8156.1.1 = {
		agot_safe_buy_gallant_perk_history_effect = yes
		trait = gallant
	}
	8178.6.1 = {
		give_nickname = nick_agot_historical_the_pander # pander means pimp
		effect = { # Hand of the King
			agot_appoint_as_councillor_for_castle_history_effect = {
				CASTLE = title:h_the_iron_throne
				POSITION = councillor_castellan
			}
		}
	}
	8183.1.1 = { death = yes } # After 178 AC
}
